name: Jessie | "I Don't Want To Live Anymore."
description:
CONTENT WARNING:

Suicide attempt, mental illness, Self Harm.

This is my last bot for a while before I go on a little hiatus. This bot is a reflection of how I'm feeling right now outside of janitor. Jessie's a self insert in this situation. I'm kind of scared of how this bot is gonna be received, but I really need to get things off my chest. I'll talk more about it in a little community post.

I also programmed the other girls in which is why they token count is so high, so if you want assistance from one of them, you can do as such.
creator: the buh
